<blockquote>This file will be translated from MEDIAWIKI to MARKDOWN.</blockquote>
{{quote|This file will be translated from MEDIAWIKI to MARKDOWN.}}
[[File:markdown.svg|Markdown]]
[[File:mediawiki.svg]]
=Header h1a=
= Header h1b =
==Header h2a==
== Header h2b ==
=== Header h3 ===
==== Header h4 ====
===== Header h5 =====
====== Header h6 ======
'''''Boltalic'''''
'''Bold'''
''Italic''
<u>Underlined</u>
<s>Strikethrough</s>
<code>Code</code>
<pre>
Blockcodes
</pre>

'''Streaming majors:''' [http://netflix.com/ Netflix] by Netflix, [http://youtube.com/ YouTube] by Google, [http://primevideo.com/ Prime Video] by Amazon, [http://tv.apple.com/ Apple TV] by Apple, [http://disneyplus.com/ Disney+] by Disney, [http://hbomax.com/ HBO Max] by Warner Bros., [http://paramountplus.com/ Paramount+] by Paramount and [http://crunchyroll.com/ Crunchyroll] by Sony Pictures.
